mapper.select: select dispute_id, order_id, goods_type, buyer_user_id, seller_user_id, status, reason, buyer_note, seller_note, resolution_type, resolved_by, resolved_at, create_time, update_time from market_dispute where dispute_id = #{disputeId}

select dispute_id, order_id, goods_type, buyer_user_id, seller_user_id, status, reason, buyer_note, seller_note, resolution_type, resolved_by, resolved_at, create_time, update_time from market_dispute where order_id = #{orderId} order by dispute_id desc

select dispute_id, order_id, goods_type, buyer_user_id, seller_user_id, status, reason, buyer_note, seller_note, resolution_type, resolved_by, resolved_at, create_time, update_time from market_dispute where status in ('OPEN', 'SELLER_REJECTED') order by dispute_id desc
mapper.update: update market_dispute set status = #{status}, reason = #{reason}, buyer_note = #{buyerNote}, seller_note = #{sellerNote}, resolution_type = #{resolutionType}, resolved_by = #{resolvedBy}, resolved_at = #{resolvedAt}, update_time = current_timestamp where dispute_id = #{disputeId}
